retired_model_assumptions.reason: The model fixture represents duplicate receipt-id double mint, but the executable iCKB receipt cell data used by original iCKB and CellScript fixtures has no receipt-id byte field. The fixture-bound receipt group exact-mint differential row already executes two receipt inputs with identical receipt data and both sides accept when the aggregate xUDT amount is exact.
retired_model_assumptions.replacement_evidence: differential: receipt group exact mint original vs CellScript agree

retired_model_assumptions.reason: The model fixture compares synthetic owner and claimed_owner fields, but current executable Owned-Owner fixtures encode ownership through lock/type script placement, OutPoint/MetaPoint relative distance, and an i32 owner-cell data field. They do not contain an owner or claimed_owner byte field or witness-auth payload. Existing VM rows cover valid pairing, relative mismatch, missing/duplicate owner cells, script role, withdrawal-shape, related type/data, and malformed owner distance.
retired_model_assumptions.replacement_evidence: differential: valid owned-owner original vs CellScript agree

retired_model_assumptions.reason: The model fixture expresses redeem maturity with synthetic current_epoch and maturity_epoch fields. The executable iCKB DAO phase-2 path expresses the same maturity boundary through input since, withdrawal/deposit headers, and witness input_type header index. The DAO immature withdrawal differential row already executes that chain-level immature path on both original iCKB DAO and CellScript.
retired_model_assumptions.replacement_evidence: differential: DAO immature withdrawal original vs CellScript agree
